message:
Enhance Node.js compatibility in JS polyfills

- Extended fs module: readdirSync with withFileTypes, lstatSync, rmSync,
  realpathSync, accessSync, createReadStream, createWriteStream
- Add globalThis.crypto with randomUUID and getRandomValues
- Use globalThis._modules for require() compatibility
- Add child_process stub module

files.patch:
@@ -50,4 +50,11 @@ Thumbs.db
 *.so
 *.a
 *.o
-*.cache
\ No newline at end of file
+*.cache
+
+# Vendor submodule build artifacts (never commit upstream changes)
+vendor/wasmedge/build*/
+vendor/quickjs-ng/build*/
+
+# Test files should be in test/ directory
+/test_*.js
\ No newline at end of file
